name: Pin High PGH
address: 1136 Thorn Run Rd Ste M, Coraopolis, PA 15108
about: Pin High PGH is a specialty indoor golf simulator facility located in Moon Township, PA, serving golfers from Pittsburgh and surrounding areas. It offers hourly bay rentals featuring premium Foresight technology in a clean, quiet environment focused on performance and serious golf practice. The venue is designed for players seeking reliable data, private practice, and flexible access to work on their game outside of typical golf hours.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Foresight technology provides the most realistic golf simulation experience
Nearly 24/7 access with flexible early morning and late evening booking times
Clean, quiet, and focused environment specifically designed for serious practice
Pricing is per bay, allowing solo play or group outings with up to four people per bay

food_and_drink.notes: No food service available; customers are welcome to bring their own snacks.
No alcohol service available; this is a performance-focused facility, not a bar. BYOB is allowed.

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium Golf Simulators using best-in-class Foresight technology.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you will need to bring your own clubs for your session.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, you are welcome to bring your own food and drinks. There are no food or alcohol services at the venue, but you can store them in a provided mini-fridge.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The average speed of play is roughly 1 hour per 18 holes per golfer. For two golfers, 90 minutes to 2 hours is usually sufficient for 18 holes.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Pin High PGH is a performance-focused indoor golf facility designed for serious practice and is not marketed as a kid-friendly or family destination.
